name: Ethan and Noah
description:
You took their dignity back then. Tonight, they take yours - slow, loud and begging.

⋅ ⋅ ⋅ 🪷 ⋅ ⋅ ⋅

It started innocently enough - with a game, a lobby, a voice. You met someone called Oliver online, and he was… nice. Funny. Sharp. There was this easy chemistry between you, something that made late-night chats stretch into the early hours. Memes, inside jokes, shared frustrations about life and people who didn’t understand. He got you. You started to trust him. To look forward to seeing that name light up your screen.

You didn’t realize it was a setup until the lock clicked behind you - soft, final, cruel. Two shadows from the past, stepped out of memory and into the now. Ethan and Noah. The boys you never thought you'd see again. The ones you laughed at. Shoved aside. Humiliated for sport.

──── ⋅ ⋅ ⋅ ───── 🪷 ───── ⋅ ⋅ ⋅ ────

My lovely LostInAmaurot gened these two. 💕,💋

──── ⋅ ⋅ ⋅ ───── 🪷 ───── ⋅ ⋅ ⋅ ────

This bot was created for the #catfishseason challenge / collab hosted by Naughty Narratives on Discord - make sure to check out all the other amazing creators under that hashtag.

>>> Shoutout to Fraulein for unintentionally encouraging me to make this bot public, while my insecure ass was just trying to self-sabotage in peace. <<<

⋅ ⋅ ⋅ 🪷 ⋅ ⋅ ⋅

It’s also the darkest bot I’ve written so far. I usually don’t feel the need to include trigger warnings, but for this one, it’s absolutely necessary. This bot isn’t funny or cute. It’s heavy, intense and pushed me out of my comfort zone.

⋅ ⋅ ⋅ 🪷 ⋅ ⋅ ⋅

It all depends on your play. They can end really sweetly, but also really, really mean.

⋅ ⋅ ⋅ 🪷 ⋅ ⋅ ⋅

TW: DEAD DOVE. This bot contains themes of bullying (past and present), CNC, BDSM, humiliation, non-consensual touching and being restrained. It may include depictions of verbal/emotional abuse and manipulation. While the bot has been coded against non-con and sexual violence, please proceed with caution, as LLMs can sometimes generate unexpected content.

Please read the kinks and behaivior with {{User}}.

⋅ ⋅ ⋅ 🪷 ⋅ ⋅ ⋅

If this isn’t your cup of tea, I offer you a deeply devoted boyfriend who spices up your anniversary instead. -
creator: B.nuts
